claim: Claude Skills are markdown files with instructions and optional subdirectories for resources and scripts; create skills without code by using the skill creator
actionable: Create new skills using Claude's skill-creator tool; organize resources and scripts in subdirectories referenced from skill.md
source_title: Claude Skills Explained - Step-by-Step Tutorial for Beginners

claim: Skills integrate with MCP servers, allowing Claude to pull live data from apps like Gmail, QuickBooks, and CRMs
actionable: Connect MCP servers (Gmail, QuickBooks, etc.) to skills; agents can now access live app data within skill workflows
source_title: Claude Skills Explained - Step-by-Step Tutorial for Beginners

claim: Skills automatically trigger when Claude recognizes their purpose in user prompts; no explicit activation needed
actionable: Design skill names and instructions for easy recognition; Claude will auto-activate matching skills
source_title: Claude Skills Explained - Step-by-Step Tutorial for Beginners

claim: Repeating skill names explicitly in prompts increases reliability of skill activation; auto-detection is not 100% reliable
actionable: When invoking a skill, mention the skill name explicitly in the prompt (e.g., 'Gmail summary') to ensure activation
source_title: Claude Skills Explained - Step-by-Step Tutorial for Beginners

claim: Skills work across Claude.ai, Claude Desktop, and Claude Code without modification; same skill.md works everywhere
actionable: Write skills once; deploy to all Claude surfaces by uploading to Claude settings
source_title: Claude Skills Explained - Step-by-Step Tutorial for Beginners
